mapper.select:
SELECT sa.*, sc.amount FROM scholarship_apply sa LEFT JOIN scholarship sc ON sa.scholarship_id = sc.id WHERE 1=1
AND (sa.student_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR sa.student_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%'))
AND sa.scholarship_id = #{query.scholarshipId} AND sa.status = #{query.status} ORDER BY sa.apply_time DESC
SELECT sa.*, sc.amount FROM scholarship_apply sa LEFT JOIN scholarship sc ON sa.scholarship_id = sc.id WHERE sa.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY sa.apply_time DESC
